title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Suite Artifact Index

artifacts.title: Project status
artifacts.proves: Gives a compact verified/data-gated/not-redistributed decision table for first-pass readers.

artifacts.title: Project status JSON
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable copy of the current project status for website and HF mirrors.

artifacts.title: Evidence contract
artifacts.proves: Defines the implemented scope, setup-stage items, and multi-episode prerequisites.

artifacts.title: Project packet
artifacts.proves: Gives a short project path with scope status and public surfaces.

artifacts.title: Artifact guide
artifacts.proves: Gives the human-readable map from project scope to data, tasks, platform mirrors, and scale-up status.

artifacts.title: Official Xperience-10M dataset-card alignment
artifacts.proves: Aligns public dataset wording with the official gated Xperience-10M card, public sample card, HF API metadata, and current project coverage.

artifacts.title: Official Xperience-10M dataset-card alignment JSON
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable upstream dataset-card, sample-card, and HF API alignment facts for website and HF mirrors.

artifacts.title: Source alignment
artifacts.proves: Summarizes the pass/fail check for full-dataset facts, sample-card facts, API-listing caveats, and current-project markers.

artifacts.title: Source alignment JSON
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable source-alignment pass/fail check for repo, website, and HF surfaces.

artifacts.title: Source alignment validator
artifacts.proves: Regenerates the source-alignment report from committed facts and public card text.

artifacts.title: Hugging Face publisher
artifacts.proves: Publishes prepared Space, artifact dataset, and model bundles, including an explicit model-binary upload batch.

artifacts.title: Evaluation protocol
artifacts.proves: Defines the window unit, chronological split, task metrics, leakage controls, and current limitations.

artifacts.title: Evaluation protocol JSON
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable protocol generated from committed task metrics for website and HF mirrors.

artifacts.title: Evaluation protocol builder
artifacts.proves: Regenerates the protocol from committed summary metrics and task artifacts.

artifacts.title: Research takeaways
artifacts.proves: Summarizes the main research lessons from committed metrics and identifies which experiments need held-out episodes.

artifacts.title: Research takeaways JSON
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable result interpretation for the website, HF cards, and mirror checks.

artifacts.title: Research takeaways builder
artifacts.proves: Regenerates the research takeaways from committed summary metrics and task result artifacts.

artifacts.title: Figure index
artifacts.proves: Catalogs public figures, charts, modality thumbnails, dimensions, hashes, roles, and source scripts.

artifacts.title: Figure index JSON
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable visual asset index for website and Hugging Face mirrors.

artifacts.title: Figure index builder
artifacts.proves: Regenerates visual-asset hashes, dimensions, and source-script provenance.

artifacts.title: Brand assets manifest
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable manifest for the generated logo system, favicon, social card, dimensions, hashes, and usage roles.

artifacts.title: Brand logo social card
artifacts.proves: Provides the project logo card used in README, Hugging Face cards, and social previews.

artifacts.title: Brand asset builder
artifacts.proves: Regenerates logo derivatives, favicon variants, app icons, and the Open Graph social card from the generated logo mark.

artifacts.title: Publication quality gates
artifacts.proves: Lists the automated and post-publish gates required before presenting a release as current.

artifacts.title: Quality-gate manifest
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable release-gate summary for validators, mirrors, and public project surfaces.

artifacts.title: Public presentation check
artifacts.proves: Checks whether the repo, website, and Hugging Face cards read as one coherent research project surface.

artifacts.title: Public presentation check JSON
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable checks for SEO/social metadata, accessible tab semantics, public links, project-check links, and reader-facing copy consistency.

artifacts.title: Public presentation check builder
artifacts.proves: Regenerates the public presentation check before release.

artifacts.title: Task-surface integrity report
artifacts.proves: Confirms the public 12-task cards use human-readable research names, representative modality thumbnails, and the interactive walkthrough/player JSON contract.

artifacts.title: Task-surface integrity validator
artifacts.proves: Regenerates the task-surface integrity report and fails if task cards expose raw artifact ids or lose the interactive player wiring.

artifacts.title: Live publication status
artifacts.proves: Records the last live GitHub/HF URL verification after upload.

artifacts.title: Live publication verifier
artifacts.proves: Fetches the published GitHub/HF URLs and compares live hashes and public-card markers against the release assets.

artifacts.title: Reproducibility contract
artifacts.proves: Defines public reproduction commands, expected outputs, and non-reproducible scale-up boundaries.

artifacts.title: Reproducibility matrix
artifacts.proves: Machine-readable reproduction steps with expected artifacts and public boundaries.

artifacts.title: Artifact index builder
artifacts.proves: Generates the selective proof-artifact catalog from local files.

artifacts.title: Publication package check
artifacts.proves: Confirms public bundles pass raw-data, cache, archive, and token-string checks.

artifacts.title: Scale-up status check
artifacts.proves: Confirms historical 32ep path strings stay in setup-file provenance and are not presented as completed 32-episode results.

artifacts.title: Prepared mirror parity report
artifacts.proves: Confirms prepared GitHub/HF Space/artifact/model mirrors share the same critical data, figure, website HTML, and validator files.

artifacts.title: Website integrity report
artifacts.proves: Confirms local website links, anchors, JSON data files, and referenced images resolve.

artifacts.title: Project manifest
artifacts.proves: Lists public URLs, upstream sources, and machine-readable project metadata.

artifacts.title: 12-task summary report
artifacts.proves: Stores the task definitions, splits, feature dimension, and minimal/neural metrics.

artifacts.title: Website metrics bundle
artifacts.proves: Mirrors task metrics for the static dashboard.

artifacts.title: Feature manifest
artifacts.proves: Maps the 8,378-dimensional window vector back to source feature blocks.

artifacts.title: Available modalities
artifacts.proves: Documents which sample modalities entered the current extracted feature contract.

artifacts.title: Aligned windows table
artifacts.proves: Lists the 1,161 aligned windows and their frame/action/subtask labels.

artifacts.title: Neural MLP task-head results
artifacts.proves: Stores matching PyTorch MLP results for the 12 task contracts.

artifacts.title: Research direction taxonomy
artifacts.proves: Maps the 12 tasks to the four Ropedia research directions as direct/proxy/diagnostic.

artifacts.title: Research direction extension probes
artifacts.proves: Stores one coded extension probe per research direction with minimal and neural metrics.

artifacts.title: Task walkthroughs
artifacts.proves: Explains every task with case study, input, process modules, output, and limitation.

artifacts.title: 12-task suite infographic
artifacts.proves: Presents the task suite and sample modality thumbnails with metrics generated from committed files.

artifacts.title: Responsive modality atlas
artifacts.proves: Documents the seven public-sample modality cards and their derived thumbnail assets.

artifacts.title: Standalone modality thumbnails
artifacts.proves: Stores small derived thumbnails for readable website modality cards without raw data redistribution.

artifacts.title: Pipeline figure
artifacts.proves: Shows the raw-episode to artifact pipeline with verified labels.

artifacts.title: Architecture figure
artifacts.proves: Shows the shared feature pipeline and minimal/neural head families.

artifacts.title: Qwen3-Omni data blocker report
artifacts.proves: Documents the data-access requirement before the 32-episode Qwen3-Omni pilot can run.

artifacts.title: Multi-episode access status
artifacts.proves: Documents the public multi-episode access boundary and 32-episode pilot selection without exposing private infrastructure details.

artifacts.title: Citation metadata
artifacts.proves: Makes the project externally citable.

artifacts.title: License and data terms
artifacts.proves: Separates MIT-scoped code from original Xperience-10M data terms.
